title: Court orders psychiatric evaluation for Van Druten, bail application withdrawn
bodyText: [{"type":"contributor","text":"Marguerite van Ginkel","contributorName":"Marguerite van Ginkel","contributorDate":"Friday, 06 February 2026, 11:47"},{"type":"intro_bold","text":"The bail hearing took a dramatic turn this morning."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Update\n Video","html":"Update\n Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS & VIDEOS - The State’s application for Bevan van Druten (53), accused of murdering his girlfriend, Nicky van Heerden (54), to be sent for psychiatric evaluation was approved by the Plettenberg Bay Magistrate’s Court today, Friday 6 February.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS & VIDEOS - The State’s application for Bevan van Druten (53), accused of murdering his girlfriend, Nicky van Heerden (54), to be sent for psychiatric evaluation was approved by the Plettenberg Bay Magistrate’s Court today, Friday 6 February."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The defence confirmed it did not oppose the evaluation, which will take place in Valkenberg Psychiatric Hospital in Cape Town."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The defence also withdrew its bail application.","html":"The defence also withdrew its bail application."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The court ordered the evaluation process to be expedited, and the results are to be presented at the next hearing on 6 March.","html":"The court ordered the evaluation process to be expedited, and the results are to be presented at the next hearing on 6 March."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George Herald will continue to follow the case closely. Look out for a more detailed report of what transpired in the court proceedings today.","html":"George Herald will continue to follow the case closely. Look out for a more detailed report of what transpired in the court proceedings today."},{"type":"heading","text":"VIDEO: Bail hearing takes dramatic turn as Van Druten submits personal statement","level":"h3"}]
bodyHtml: [{"type":"contributor","text":"Marguerite van Ginkel","contributorName":"Marguerite van Ginkel","contributorDate":"Friday, 06 February 2026, 11:47"},{"type":"intro_bold","text":"The bail hearing took a dramatic turn this morning."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Update\n Video","html":"Update\n Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS & VIDEOS - The State’s application for Bevan van Druten (53), accused of murdering his girlfriend, Nicky van Heerden (54), to be sent for psychiatric evaluation was approved by the Plettenberg Bay Magistrate’s Court today, Friday 6 February.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS & VIDEOS - The State’s application for Bevan van Druten (53), accused of murdering his girlfriend, Nicky van Heerden (54), to be sent for psychiatric evaluation was approved by the Plettenberg Bay Magistrate’s Court today, Friday 6 February."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The defence confirmed it did not oppose the evaluation, which will take place in Valkenberg Psychiatric Hospital in Cape Town."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The defence also withdrew its bail application.","html":"The defence also withdrew its bail application."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The court ordered the evaluation process to be expedited, and the results are to be presented at the next hearing on 6 March.","html":"The court ordered the evaluation process to be expedited, and the results are to be presented at the next hearing on 6 March."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George Herald will continue to follow the case closely. Look out for a more detailed report of what transpired in the court proceedings today.","html":"George Herald will continue to follow the case closely. Look out for a more detailed report of what transpired in the court proceedings today."},{"type":"heading","text":"VIDEO: Bail hearing takes dramatic turn as Van Druten submits personal statement","level":"h3"}]

images.alt: Court orders psychiatric evaluation for Van Druten, bail application withdrawn

author: Marguerite van Ginkel
teaser: The bail hearing took a dramatic turn this morning.
featuredCaption: Bevan van Druten in court this morning, Friday 6 February. Photo: Cameron Squire
